daily.today_energy: Your vibe is unapologetically bold today. Mercury's got your back, making it the perfect time to express what's been sitting in your chest. Trust the momentum—it's real.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, genuine conversations hit different rn. Single? Someone's been lowkey noticing your energy. Either way, authenticity is your love language today.
daily.career: Your ideas deserve airtime. The universe is backing your initiatives, so pitch that project or speak up in meetings. Your confidence is contagious right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement—whether that's a workout, a walk, or just dancing in your room. Listen to what makes you feel alive. Rest matters too, no cap.

weekly.overview: Mercury's vibes are hitting different this week, Aries. You're radiating main character energy and people are noticing. Trust your gut on new opportunities—your intuition is basically your superpower rn. Things are flowing, so just go with it.
weekly.love: Single or taken, your magnetism is off the charts. If you're coupled up, deep convos are calling your name. If you're solo, someone might slide in soon, but focus on loving yourself first—that's the real energy shift happening.
weekly.career: Your ideas are too good to keep quiet. This is your moment to pitch, propose, or just make moves. The universe is basically saying go for it. Your confidence combined with action? That's the combo that gets things done this week.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and hydration, bestie. Try channeling that Aries fire into something that makes you feel alive—workouts, dancing, creating. Movement is your medicine right now. Listen to what feels good.
